entry.title: Re: SAP Console and S/4Hana

entry.title: How to enhance the Request Material(MDG) App Lean App ID(F0502)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Example Requirement: Enhance the Standard "Request Material(MDG)" app to have a Custom field and send to MDG backend staging table. From MDG the custom field will be mapped to standard Manufacture part number.

1) Front end: Is there any way to Enhance "Request Material(MDG)" via BAS and in BAS this app itself is not loading via adaptation project as the Fiori Library shows Enhancement points. In WEB IDE can we do extensions, we are using development tool BAS and how to get the license for webide full stack in BTP.

2) Backend: The Service Associated With the app is MDG_MATERIAL_SRV which should be extended with Z service can we use CFL instead of Append structure.

entry.title: Re: ABAP-Types with class
entry.content:
@jrgkraus I've unfortunately found that not to be true all the time. For variables typed by data element LVC_VALUE, the help_id of the cl_abap_elemdescr doesn't contain the domain name TEXT128, but instead contains LVC_VALUE again.

Do you know of any other alternative to get the domain through RTTI? I'm still on 7.56, on-prem.

entry.title: Connection restrictions and their relation to user groups in SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database
entry.content:
Connect restrictions are access policies and essentially enforcing the limited access to SAP HANA Database for users which belong to a specific user group*. For example, they can be used to restrict access for administrator users to a given IP range, or for technical users to specific applications. 

They enable customers the flexibility to limit access for all users or parts of their user base, for instance, to enable only administrators to log in from the customer's IP range and application range based on the application session variable. 

Benefits: 

  • Provides more fine-granular control over security configuration settings 
  • Allows customers to further secure their systems against attacks from the Internet 

More about connect restrictions you can read in SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database Security Guide: User Management -> User Groups -> Connect Restrictions. 

 

Setting up the connect restrictions by using SAP HANA Cloud Central 

For a demonstration of how you can make use of connect restrictions, I will use HANA tooling, and more specifically, SAP HANA Cloud Central**. 

A typical customer scenario that is pursued with the usage of this functionality is to limit the access of the users from specific applications they use to access HANA. Also, it is a case when technical users of HANA DB should not be allowed to connect or log into specific apps, with the help of which you can manipulate data or settings in HANA, like HDBSQL or HANA Cockpit/DB Explorer. 

To create connect restriction policies, you need to access SAP HANA Cloud -> section “User & Authorization Management” -> subsection “User groups”. 

If you cannot see this tile or access SAP HANA Cloud Central, please check SAP HANA Cloud Administration Guide documentation for needed tools subscription and missing authorizations for user. 

Creating a User Group-Specific Connect Restriction 

A single connect restriction can contain multiple applications and IP conditions.  

To configure those conditions, a user requires an OPERATOR object privilege on the given user group. This can be done by a creator of the given user group or another user who has GRANTOR privilege on this given user group. 

1. If not yet created, in the “User & Authorization Management” section, subsection “User groups,” set up a user group, for which you will subsequently create required restrictions. For us, it will be Administrators1. Move required users to this Group. 

2. Scroll down and create a connect restriction NetworkRestrictions1 with conditions for IP addresses in CIDR notation and application. The restriction allows connections for hdbsql application from the mentioned IP addresses and IP ranges. 

You can define multiple connect restrictions in a single statement. The following example shows how to define connect restrictions for IPS_V4, IPS_V6, and HDBSQL: 

3. The definition of connect restrictions and a list of connection restrictions by user group can also be viewed in the system view USERGROUP_CONNECT_RESTRICTIONS. 

An example for the USERGROUP_CONNECT_RESTRICTIONS table would be as follows in the SQL console of SAP HANA Cloud Central if you execute the steps above: 

Additional syntax for user group creation statements with parameters of connect restrictions can be found in SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database SQL Reference Guide -> CREATE USERGROUP Statement (Access Control). 

Evaluation of Connect Restrictions 

After the user has successfully authenticated, connect restrictions are evaluated as part of the user authentication process. If the user group has connect restrictions, members of that group can only connect if at least one of the defined connect restrictions allows access. 

Note: A single connect restriction can consist of multiple conditions, and all must be met to allow access for the user.

Deactivating connection for all Users of a User Group 

Use the ENABLE | DISABLE CLIENT CONNECT option to control whether or not the users in a user group can connect to the SAP HANA database, for example, to stop users temporarily from connecting during updates or troubleshooting activities. 

Sample Code:  

ALTER USERGROUP MyUserGroup DISABLE CLIENT CONNECT 

If you disable client connects for a user group using this feature, no user of that user group can connect, even if connect restrictions would allow it. 

Validating a User Group-Specific Connect Restriction 

In the connect restriction bar on the top right, you also can validate whether a connect attempt would be possible given the active connect restrictions of a user group: 

The window will pop up where you can test different options and get the results: 

Also, you can use the table function PUBLIC.VALIDATE_USERGROUP_CONNECT_RESTRICTION to do that and use the table function PUBLIC.VALIDATE_USERGROUP_CONNECT_RESTRICTION_DETAILS to display details of each connect restriction if a login was allowed for a specific condition. 

Some things to keep in mind about validation views: 

  • This table functions validates all connect restrictions of a user group 
  • Returns a detailed result of each connect restriction if a login is allowed 
  • The check is done for the active and inactive restrictions of a user group: 
    • Client IP Address 
    • Application Name 
  • NULL values will be returned if a condition doesn’t exist in a connect restriction. 
  • The input parameters can be omitted as they are supplemented by default values. 

Authentication/Connect Failures due to Connect Restrictions 

If a user connection cannot be established due to a connect restriction, you can find details about why the connection was rejected in the “Failed Authentications” page of “User & Authorization Management” tile of SAP HANA Cloud Central. We will talk more about these features in our future blog post.

 

Additional resources to check: 

*User groups support a separation of user management tasks, allowing you to manage related users together and efficiently. A user can belong to only one user group. You can create and manage users in user groups in the SAP HANA Cloud Central and SAP HANA Cockpit. 

More about user groups you can read in SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database Security Guide: User Management -> User Groups, and for more information on how to create, see the SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database SQL Reference Guide: 

  • CREATE USERGROUP Statement (Access Control) 
  • ALTER USERGROUP Statement (Access Control) 

**With the migration of SAP HANA Cockpit functionality in SAP HANA Cloud Central, all of the documentation for these features has also been migrated to the SAP HANA Cloud docu set. 

Moreover, SAP HANA Cloud Central has in-app help that can be accessed by clicking the “?” icon in the shellbar. This in-app help is extensive and contains links to relevant content in the cloud docu set. 

The following links may also be helpful: 

For SAP data lake (SAP HANA Cloud) administration: SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake Administration Guide for Data Lake Relational Engine 

For SAP HANA Cloud administration: SAP HANA Cloud Administration Guide 

For SAP HANA database (SAP HANA Cloud) administration: SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA Database Administration Guide 

Also, the SAP HANA Cloud Database Administration with SAP HANA Cockpit still exists but will not be updated or maintained.

entry.title: Re: Take Photo in Maintenance Apps on Microsoft Surface G...

Hi Higgo

Microsoft Surface isn't one of the supported platforms unfortunately 

iPad and Android are which is why it works there 

Sorry cant provide better news

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Get and Stay Certified for Customer Experience Certifications

As far as I understand, it is much more expensive to get one of this rather than paying again for the package that provides 6 certification attemps.

Let me know your comments.

Thanks.

Alejandro.

entry.title: SAP BW - Master Data Delta Load
entry.content:

We did a master data enhancement and planning to move the changes to production.

We are using as delta load in BW can someone, please help us on the cut over activities to be perform before moved the changes to ECC Prod.

Do we need to clear the queue?? Like we do in 2LIS_11_VAITM?? 

Thank you for the support in advance.

 

Kind Regards,

Venkat

entry.title: Re: Can't change binding for visibility in ui designer
entry.content: Thanks for your response. What does CT stand for?

entry.title: We Need a help to check the punchout catalogues configuration in our S4 system
entry.content:
We need to upload and update the punchout catalogues configuration but we don't have idea on this configuration related punchout catalogues. Specially we are looking into configuration for punchout catalogue.

You can check this in our system by using the transaction code ME23N.in this screen navigate to Catalog and choose catalog. Kindly help with the configuration steps for this particular set up as we need to update the credentials for target catalog in S4 system.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We Need a help to check the punchout catalogues confi...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The configuration relating to credentials for a catalog in Materials Management can be found in transaction OLME, then follow the path: Environment Data -> Web Services: ID and Description. This will list all catalogs. 

From here highlight the desired catalog and double click on 'Call structure'. Here the credentials are maintained. 

I hope this helps further. 

Kind Regards, 
Lisa 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content: @2233667 Attached where?

entry.title: Does API request use SAML assertion like end-user?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

As you know, SAML assertion is used in S/4HANA user login. I'm just wondering if API request (e.g., OData) by communication user also uses SAML and IdP? The other relevant question is that does S/4HANA stores user credentials as well as IdP？

Regards, Eric

HS

entry.title: External candidate profile converted into internal for the wrong employee
entry.content: If a recruiter puts the wrong employee ID on a newly hired candidate profile, and it gets converted to internal for the wrong employee, how can this be corrected?  The wrong employee would see the personal information and application history for the newly hired employee.

entry.title: SBPA - How to handle Intermediate Message Event requirement
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few requirement/scenario to implement using Intermediate Message event in workflow, earlier we  had implement using workflows(Workflow Management).

Now we thought of implementing using complete workflow requirement in Process automation using Business processes, but we don't see Intermediate message event options.

Example scenario : In-between Business Process execution need to wait until get information received from external system (Non - SAP Applications).

Please suggest how to handle this requirements.

Regards,

Satya

entry.title: Hybris user not authenticated after SAML successful round trip
entry.content:
Hi,

we are using the samlsinglesignon extension to implement SSO with Azure B2C IDP. After going through all the configuration steps, we are able to perform SSO authentication but the hybris user is not authenticated. I was expecting the extension to take care of it.

I extended DefaultSSOService and added the below code:

this.userService.setCurrentUser(user);
this.customerFacade.loginSuccess();
 
In my debugging session, I can see that "user" is the one I authenticated via SSO. However, I see that the "currentUser" is reverted to Anonymous. I can see that when placing a breakpoint in a BeforeControllerHandler code for example.
 
I am not sure what I am missing here

Lord Lucho

Vasu

entry.title: Production order : double confirmation B10 for the same personal number
entry.content:
Hi,

I faced the following problem in CO19: the production operators can confirm twice the same operation with the same personal number and with the same confirmation event B10.

I'm sure it was not the case before we upgraded in EHP8 but I don't have a system EHP7 anymore.

In AFRU, I have 2 lines with B10, same confirmation number, same personal number without a B30 (interruption) in between.

How is it possible ?

Thanks in advance for your support,
Waebou

entry.title: MRP live: Purchasing schedule Lines are not updated by plant run but by materialwise run
entry.content:
All,
we are facing a curious issue. Since a few weeks our system, RISE: Rel 2020, is not planning materials which are set up for use of schedule agreement as relevant for MRP in the daily background jobs. If I run MD01n by particular material, system is planning as expected.
Because of other settings in the material master (use of coverage profile) we are getting warning that the materials can only be planned by classic MRP. We also made seetings in MD_MRP_FORCE_CLASSIC ("force classic" and "accept issue") but no effect.

Any ideas or suggestions

I think this was the issue.

entry.content:
Hello, 

 

I am currently working on sap Public cloud. I would want to know if it is possible to add WBS elements at item level on service orders using migration cockpit. 

As I can understand, this object is not available on the standard cockpit and I think we can upload a template with the "Mapping of Work Breakdown Structure Element (WBS Element)" but when I apply it and check for updates on the template, there is no change or new zone dedicated for WBS elements. there is any document explaining that process? 

Thanks in advance

Exit is NS23 , definition in exit titles as below

No Rules are defined

2nd row

Its giving the error ‘NS22’ not found

 

 

 

No rules are defined.

entry.title: Save File using File Dialog
smarttable barcode
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to convert a smart table cell into a barcode image.

I am using the function JsBarcode inside a formatter but I am having an error because, I think, the table is not rendered yet.

In my view.xml I have:

 

                            <cells>
                                 <Image id="T" src="{path: 'Obj_key', formatter:'.formatBarcode'}" />
                            </cells>
 
Is there a way I can manipulate a smart table item cell after it has been rendered, as I think this might solve the issue?.
Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: Re: Save File using File Dialog
entry.content: The task is to enable a file storing from cockpit application. The bytes should be stored on client computer, at best by using a file dialog. That file should be used later by the customer

entry.title: External users/ native sign in users password reset in LMS
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there any way to reset the External users password without going in to LMS system?

When users are trying to use the Forgot password option in External LMS site, they are being asked for security question answer but most of the time users are unable to remember the answer for security question.

so, in that case only admin can reset the password...i want to know Is there any other way to reset the external users password without going into LMS system.

Thanks

entry.title: Single Inbound delivery with multiple containers
entry.content:
Hi, gurus.

I'm new to S/4 Hana and EWM and I'm working as a material planner.

We are building a new system with consultants and the IT department but there is a problem with the management of inbound delivery.

I have a material that the monthly requirement is about 10,000 tons.

Delivery lead-time is about 2 months and B/L is usually issued with hundreds of tons of the material.

But the point of view for management way is different with IT department.

They are trying to make inbound deliveries for each container because they need to trace the materials each containers have.

In this case, about 1,000 inbound deliveries covering 2 months of the lead time will remain every time and I should manage the inbound deliveries. (a container is 20t / 20,000t will be goods in transit to cover the lead time)

We even do not use EDI and will upload an Excel sheet for creating inbound delivery.

I think that the inbound delivery should be created based on B/L and it should be managed by handling unit or another way.

Would you please give a tip for this situation?

I'd like to know if I can use the HU identification 2 field for distinguishing containers.

 

- Requirements

1) Top-level Handling Unit is a pallet.

 -> I suggested they use a container as one of HU but it has been denied due to time limitation.

2) They want to post GR based on a container.

3) They also want to know what pallet is in which container.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: Lock object (SM12) from UI5 Application
entry.content:
Hi Guys,

I've been searching for this, optimistic, pessimistic, durable locks, etc .. 
But still couldn't achieve what I'm looking for. 

I've tried using a Function Import to call the ENQUEUE  function model for a transfer order (LE-WM) but  as soon the call ends the lock is cleared in SM12. I know and understand the issues that may arise ( close browser, etc .. ) but that's not a problem at all for the whole solution. I want to be able to lock the object and it should stay in SM12 until I call the DEQUEUE function model. 
Any tips are welcome, thanks in advance 🙂

entry.content:
Error when opening Learning Center

 

 

we have maintained a value for the parameter LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL to be the same as the value for maintained parameter DATA_URL_WPB2

but it still fails

entry.title: Re: SAP Ariba Integration scenarios with SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud system
entry.content:
Thanks, Muthu for sharing.

Item 1 (in the above table) works with and without SLP; i.e. If the customer has SAP Ariba SLP entitlement, the integration can be bi-directional else unidirectional.

entry.title: question, is there any medical management module integrated to SAP Employee central or SAP BTP?
entry.content:
Hello experts, we would like to know if there is a module where you can manage medical appointments, medication control, etc. at medical office level for an industry.
Not an independent medical center or hospital, but a small internal clinic within an industry.

Is there any solution that integrates to EMPLOYEE CENTRAL or any application already made in sap BTP or SAP independent module.

I would appreciate your comments

Thanks for everything.

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content: For those following along. My Destination for my Odata service wasn't set up correctly. It didn't have the correct properties added and the URL was missing the Port number.

entry.title: Re: Clean Up Unused Salesforce Input Key Figures - SAP IBP

entry.title: Re: IDM 7.2 - FromSAP-Parameter FILTER - Question
entry.content: Hi JaiSuryan, Ranjith, Where can I find this SELECTION query documentation how to use it etc. Please guide. Regards laxmi

entry.title: Re: IM, WM and EWM - selecting the right solution
entry.content:
@christina_wengI'm sure you're not still waiting in 2024 for an answer to the question posted in 2019 as a comment to 2013 blog post. But this post ranks high in Google search when looking for the answer on differences between IM, WM, EWM, so I thought I'd comment in case anyone else thinks along the same lines.

Assuming by PS module you meant Project Services, I'm scratching my head what do you think would be the relationship between it and any warehouse functionality... I hope you're not stockpiling people in the warehouse. But if a project also uses some materials in addition to human resources, then obviously any warehouse functionality can be applied to those materials as well.

If I may say, the way of looking at the "modules" and asking is something "compatible" seems like a fundamentally wrong way to look at SAP ERP. It's not as much about the modules as it is about the processes. PS is not isolated from other modules. For your projects, you'll likely also utilize sales documents and all the material-related functionality that comes with it. This part won't be different from any other modules / processes.

By the way, if anyone also stumbled upon this post in 2024 or later, WM is going away in 2025, IM is now called "Stock Room Management" (or something like that) and only EWM will be supported going forward. Unfortunately, in the recent migration SAP Community got completely borked and I've not bee able to find easily any posts here with the summary similar to this 2013 post. The best post from third parties I found is this one: https://blog.shiperp.com/sap-wm-vs-sap-ewm

Cheers!

entry.title: Re: XML to JSON Converter
entry.content:
I have this XML as output from an RFC FM

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<rfc:Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response xmlns:rfc="urn:sap-com:document:sap:rfc:functions">
	<ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE>
		<item>
			<CUSTOMER>0001000011</CUSTOMER>
			<CUSTOMER_NAME>ELIAS KEKAKOS</CUSTOMER_NAME>
			<CURRENCY>EUR</CURRENCY>
			<BALANCE>39640.8200</BALANCE>
			<MESSAGE/>
		</item>
	</ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE>
	<E_BALANCE>39640.8200</E_BALANCE>
	<E_CURRENCY>EUR</E_CURRENCY>
	<E_CUSTNAME>ELIAS KEKAKOS</E_CUSTNAME>
	<E_CUSTOMER>0001000011</E_CUSTOMER>
	<E_RETURN_MESSAGE/>
</rfc:Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response>

and I am receiving the following JSON

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000011",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "39640.8200",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            }
        },
        "E_BALANCE": "39640.8200",
        "E_CURRENCY": "EUR",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "0001000011",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

I want to have the following output

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": [ {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000011",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "39640.8200",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            }
           ]
        },
        "E_BALANCE": "39640.8200",
        "E_CURRENCY": "EUR",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "0001000011",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

But when I enable STREAMIMG and put in XML ELEMENT the following  Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response/ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE/item nothing is happening and if I have more than 1 ITEMS they appeared as structures like

{
    "Z_CUSTOMER_BALANCE.Response": {
        "ET_CUSTOMERS_BALANCE": {
            "item": {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000022",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "238.6900",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            },
            "item": {
                "CUSTOMER": "0001000035",
                "CUSTOMER_NAME": "ELIAS KEKAKOS2",
                "CURRENCY": "EUR",
                "BALANCE": "20639.1000",
                "MESSAGE": ""
            }
      },
        "E_BALANCE": "0.0000",
        "E_CURRENCY": "",
        "E_CUSTNAME": "",
        "E_CUSTOMER": "",
        "E_RETURN_MESSAGE": ""
    }
}

Is there any explanation for this?

Thanks in advance

Elias

entry.title: Re: Redwood RMJ Architecture, Integration and Interface review with SAP S/4 HANA and ECC Job executi
entry.content: Very nice blog! Thanks for the detail explanation

entry.title: sapui5 smarttable barcode
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to convert a smart table cell into a barcode image.

I am using the function JsBarcode inside a formatter but I am having an error because, I think, the table is not rendered yet.

In my view.xml I have:

 

                            <cells>
                                 <Image id="T" src="{path: 'Obj_key', formatter:'.formatBarcode'}" />
                            </cells>
 
Is there a way I can manipulate a smart table item cell after it has been rendered, as I think this might solve the issue?.
Thanks,
Javier

entry.title: Re: ABAP Matrix (AFM/ALM)
entry.content:
This is a great initiative! We've recently had an internal discussion at work about the base knowledge that every ABAPer should have. Because of so many changes in recent years and working with clients on very different releases, it's important to know this type of feature availability. However, this raised a valid question: how is anyone supposed to know that? As you correctly noted, currently this information is scattered.

While we were aiming at more general knowledge (e.g. "stop using classic CDS views in S/4HANA 2020" and such), having clear and detailed matrix would be very helpful.

If I may suggest, would it make more sense to arrange columns in chronological order from left to right? I looked at the table first and thought "wait, what? pooled tables are back now?" 🙂 but then realized it's in a different order (newer to the left). I believe left to right is more natural way to present this. At least that's what I've seen in similar matrices.

Thanks for sharing this!

entry.title: Re: Not able to create any decision object using SAP Buil...
entry.content: Hello, Issue is resolved. Kindly check now

entry.title: Extract Data from File fetched from UI
entry.content:
Hi All,

From UI I can able to fetch the file and store it into a folder but in next step I'm facing little issue to fetch file from folder.
Using From ASCII pass I can achieve it but I need to make it dynamic so that in next action task it takes the file from same place where it had store in first action task.
I tried storing the path in job variable in action task 1 but couldn't able to fetch this variable data in action task 2.

Please assist.

Thanks & Regards,
Laxmi

entry.title: Re: Can I apply WBS elements at item level on service ord...
entry.content:
Hi @Javier2 

 

The Migration Object Service order (only open SRVO) does not mention that WBS Element Account Assignment is supported in the online documentation at Service order (only open SRVO)

 

It would appear to be missing functionality .

The migration object supports extensibility so you could create a custom field and store the WBS Element here instead

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Where is the End User Job Aid located?
entry.content:
Hi, 

the job aids have moved to the Learning Hub library, and they can be searched for an found there individually,  but only for the last release.

You can also find the direct link to the documents below. 

https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/MqoPXdx?ltr=a&rc=10

Paul

entry.title: Re: Can I apply WBS elements at item level on service ord...
entry.content: Hello, thanks for your reply. My problem is that I use WBS for profitability analyse in project process. Create the the custom field "WBS" (already existing in Service orders) will not allow me to use the standard reportings associatet to project management. Maybe I am missing one step, but I think this element should be part of migrations cockpit as it is part of Service Orders.

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
This is really helpful. I am getting this, but can't see something wrong with the formula: 

A number, currency amount boolean, date, time, date-time, or string is expected here. I checked the format of the expiration date/time, and it seems to be a Crystal accepted format. Sample: 2022-10-01 00:00:00.000

if {Table1.status} = "ACTIVE" then
"Active or Under Renewal Process"
else if {Table1.status} = "RENEWAL PROCESS" then
if DateDiff("d", {Table1.ST_LIC_EXPIRE}, CurrentDate) < 365 then
"Active or Under Renewal Process"
else
"Expired" else "Unknown Status"

entry.title: Re: Not able to create any decision object using SAP Buil...
entry.content: No , still the https://f9add2a0trial.us10.process-automation.build.cloud.sap/comsapspaprocessautomation.comsapsparulemanagedecision/decision.html is still referencing to https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.111.0/resources/sap-ui-core.js which is causing the UI not to load.

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
In your formula on the 3rd to 4th line there's a "then if"...I'm guessing that you want an "and" there. Also at the end you've got 2 different default "else" conditions. I've commented out the last one...let me know how you want the logic to work for the grouping formula.

if {Table1.status} = "ACTIVE"
then "Active or Under Renewal Process"
else if (
     {Table1.status} = "RENEWAL PROCESS" and
     DateDiff("d", {Table1.ST_LIC_EXPIRE}, CurrentDate) < 365
) then "Active or Under Renewal Process"
else "Expired"

// else "Unknown Status"

entry.title: Re: The requests received by the Report Processing Server...
entry.content:
Which version of Crystal Server are you using?  The version of Crystal Report and the version of Crystal Reports Server must match for things to work correctly.

I see that you're using the REST API - the "Crystal Reports" part of this API currently will only work with Crystal for Enterprise reports.  From my experience, I know that the BI Platform REST API will allow you to schedule reports and get instances from the server.  However, I've had better success with using the .NET SDK for scheduling than with using the REST API.  

-Dell

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Event Kolkata 2023
entry.content:
Hey, I am writing to inquire about the timing of the first round scheduled for tomorrow's event. I apologize if this information has already been communicated and I may have missed it. I would greatly appreciate it if someone could kindly confirm the details regarding tomorrow's event, including the time of the first round.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Interested for SIT Kolkata 2024 ?
entry.content:
Hey, I am writing to inquire about the timing of the first round scheduled for tomorrow's event. I apologize if this information has already been communicated and I may have missed it. I would greatly appreciate it if someone could kindly confirm the details regarding tomorrow's event, including the time of the first round.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: How do I eliminate a page header from appearing on ev...
entry.content:
If you only ever want the page header on the first page of the report, you could put it in the Report Header instead.  If you want the page header on the first page for each group, you would use the Group Header instead and turn on "Repeat Header on Each Page" for the group.  Or if, for example, your report is an invoice and you want to have the header for each client that you are printing an invoice for, you could use the page header and do the following in the Section Expert:

1. In the Suppress formula for the page header, put the following formula: (DO NOT check the Suppress checkbox!)

PageNumber > 1

2.   For the client group footer, turn on "Reset Page Number After".  This will set the page number to 1 every time the client changes, so you'll get the page header on the next page.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: "Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a packa...

@SAPSupport Could you take a look at these two BPA structural issues?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: What is difference between material type and material...
entry.content:
Hai,

Material type is "Group of materials with similar attributes"

Material Group is "Materials were classified based on their properties"

entry.title: IBP Excel-add huge performance latency in APAC and EMEA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing issues with IBP Excel add-in performance when users are using it in EMEA/APAC, our IBP tenant is in the US Azure Datacenter. Wanted to know if any of you using IBP with Excel add-in are using tools like Azure virtual Desktop or Citrix kind of solution to avoid latency issues in EMEA/APAC. 

Appreciate your response as it's affecting our user testing and go-live readiness. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Platform CMS extracts
entry.content:
There are a couple of third-party tools that will pull this information for you.  APOS and Wiisdom (formerly GB&Smith) have tools for this.

It's also not too difficult to get this information using the Java SDK - I wrote a program that does this for all sorts of info from the CMS database and spits the data out as .csv files.  The thing to remember when querying the CMS database through the SDK is that, by default, queries will only return 1000 records.  If you don't have that many reports and instances, then that's not something to worry about.  If you do, then you'll need to either set a high limit on the number of rows using "Top N" syntax in the query or you'll need to write code to "page" the query results.

I can't share most of my code because it is copywritten by my employer.  However, here are some things to think about:

1.  I create separate classes for various things.  This encapsulates the code so that I can re-use it in any program where I need to access BOBJ from code. For example, I have separate classes that:

    A. Handle authentication and logins.  This logs a user in and then instantiates the iEnterpriseSesssion and iInfoStore that are needed for querying.  (See the BOEHelper code attached.)

    B.  Handle CMS queries.  (See the QueryHelper code attached.) This class has a bunch of methods that query for:
          - All properties of an object based on the object's SI_ID value.  The parameters to this method are the SI_ID and the table (CI_INFOOBJECTS, CI_SYSTEMOBJECTS, CI_APPOBJECTS).
          - The ID and name of all objects with a specified SI_PARENTID.
          - Run a specified query for a single result set.
          - Run a specified query for a paged result set.

    C. A separate class for each object "kind" that I query for.  These all inherit from a base class that gets the security for the object.  Within each of the sub-classes, I cast an iInfoObject from the query results to whatever kind of object it is and get the kind-specific properties for the object.

I've attached the code for logons and working with queries to get you started.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@MKreitlein  I do not have any official facts and figures, but in the Nordics this is a well known movement. Rough numbers 50% of the SAP BW customer I work with have already taken the steps to move away from BW. Of the remaining 50% approx. half of them have it as a long time vision. A big part of these customers are seriously considering SAP Datasphere as a way forward and we have several prototypes of SAP Datasphere solutions for SAP centric reporting starting up and running. 

Out of net new S/4HANA customer only a very small portion have chosen SAP BW/4HANA that last 4 years in the Nordics. Some have chosen SAP Datasphere and a big part have chosen other cloud solutions for SAP centric reporting.

entry.title: BW4HANA Views catalog
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been using BW4HANA last 2 years and accumulated over 600 calculated views (CVs).

One of the challenges to identify the data fields in the views. Is there any API available to read the metadata of the CVs to identify the data fields? Currently it is very challenging to identify the fields unless you use studio or some kind of reporting tools. 

Any advise related to this topic is much appreciated .

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad - Notification Configuration
entry.content: What to do with this error message?

entry.title: Re: Sales Cloud Version 2 odata for create Case type - Notes error
entry.content: Did you figure out how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@kenneth_dalvik  Doesn't your comment here contradict the title of this post?

" The idea is not a big bang and replace BW 7.5 over short period of time. I acknowledge that there are still gaps. And I hope that they are closed sooner rather than later. The suggestion is to have BW 7.5 and Datasphere side by side until the support of BW7.5 comes to an end in Dec 2027. That gives 3,5 years and approx 14 releases to close the necessary gaps that still exists. "

Sounds like you're saying Datasphere is not yet ready to completely replace BW for existing customers. I'd suggest changing the title as it might be a bit misleading. 

Like @MKreitlein I'd be interested in any figures you have, beyond anecdotal evidence, regarding SAP's BW customer base (> 17,000 BW customers last I heard) i.e. how many lost BW customers year over year. What type of steps are you referring to here, '50% of the SAP BW customers I work with have already taken the steps to move away from BW.'? 

Regards,

Ed

entry.title: Re: The new SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights, including MDOs, Operational Reports and Embedded
entry.content:
@ManoelCosta 

Excellent videos for understanding what eSAC offers. 

Is it possible to publish one video on OEE KPIs, which will be an eye-opener for many newcomers?

entry.title: Re: Deep-dive into SAP EWM Consolidation Groups during Packing
entry.content:
hi experts,

In the customer's scenario, we have Wave picking and will have 10 packaging tables.
I am using a 1:1 relationship between the consolidation groups and the ODOs, so that picking does not have a mix of ODOs in the same HU.
How can I allocate all ODOs from the same wave to a packaging table, without mixing more than one Wave on the table

I don't know if this is the best topic to talk about, but I really appreciate any ideas on what I should configure to make this scenario work.

Best Regards

Thanks!

entry.title: Start Hour of Sale at # instead of 1
entry.content:
Hello! New to using SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence for my business, so I apologize in advance if this is rudimentary question.

We are using the Hour of Sale characteristic in our ecomm reporting. However, the column starts with hour 1, which is 1am to 2am which is not actually the first hour of the day. The # hour is 12am to 1am, but it is the last column.

Is there a way to have the Hour of Sale start with #, then 1, 2 and so on? Instead of starting with 1?

SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI)

entry.title: what are different strategies to handle old files (> 2 year) in SAP BTP Document Management service?
entry.content:
Storage on SAP BTP Document Management service, repository option is very expensive. so, I would like to understand different strategies to handle old files (> 2 year) in SAP BTP Document Management service.

can we add a low cost external repositories (Azure blob, S3bucket, sharepoint, etc..) to offload files?

9078d97aa244c244fc63fd87937e0c06192ced0ca03ea85eb8773484dc84037e

@Dan_Wroblewski Now that was a, "Challenge".

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@edwin_ryan2  If a BW 7.5 customer can replace BW with Datasphere depends on complexity if the solutions. Low to medium complex solutions can be re-built using Datasphere objects already now. 

There are quite a substantial number of customer that does not have a SAP BW and used SAP Datasphere to build SAP centric reporting solutions.  I have personally worked with three customers in the Nordics that have built reporting solution on Datasphere. 

The title says SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW. That means to be the platform to build SAP centric reporting solution on sources like S/4HANA, Successfactors, EWM. TM.. 

It does not say to take over each and every feature for each and every solution in an existing BW7.5 solutions. That is why I am suggestion to build new requirements on SAP Datasphere and move the solutions that can be moved to start with. 

The message and the essence is for BW 7.5 customers to avoid a costly BW/4HANA upgrade and instead start manual greenfield approach with Datasphere. From total TCO perspective I am certain that is the wise thing to do.

entry.title: How to reverse or delete customer line items?
entry.content:
Hello. Last week my college taught me about SAP. And I have a practice at http://zelda.ucc.uwm.edu/fiori?sap-client=103&sap-language=EN 
So I have many questions to ask you, Sorry for that, but you know my teacher is hard to contact. And sometimes when I asked her she didn't answer me back.

I wrote all customer IDs wrong. Then I tried to reverse and reset all the invoices, but it didn't work. The debit part increases the value of the invoices. (I have a sample picture.)


As you can see from the picture above. 126,000 is an incorrect number. It has to be 34,000 (But after I reversed and reset customer invoices, the number was increased to 126,000)

And when I clicked on Debit(126,000). I got this...

Many invoices that I didn't even know where they came from. (I knew that I had done 7 wrong invoices, but not these many invoices as the above picture)  

*This is my example problem.*


At this point. you probably saw that I made a mistake. But I would like to reverse and delete an invoice. Could you help me Please? Thank you later.

entry.title: Workflow error with non existing Node/Work item in wf
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am getting below error message from workflow.

Kindly help.

Background: I deleted a standard Mail send step (TS94000113) from workflow and below message started. I haven't got any solution on the forum through similar sounding queries in past.The Mail send step (TS94000113) doesn't exists in workflow though wf behaves as if still exists. SWU_OBUF didn't worked. SWU3 has been generated.

Regards.

entry.title: Compensation tool Field filter for Promote event not working
entry.content:
In the compensation tool, there is a Field Filter which can filter records based on the criteria.

when we apply a filter with Promotion Status = Yes, is should only show records with green sign next to employee name where promote event is done but in our case it is giving out records even where promote event is not done with only some Promote event done green symbol.

for example, we have overall 150 records with promote event done for the employees - which means records with green symbol (Promotion entered) but when we apply this field filter, we see around 80-90 such records and another 20-30 records where there is no green symbol (No Promotion entered)

My and the HR role RBP is all set as we can see all employees in the scope, it is only when the filter with this field type called Promotion Status = Yes, we dont see the correct set of employee records. 

Need help if someone has come across this issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@MKreitlein @kenneth_dalvik Thanks for responses on planning in Datasphere.

Seamless planning integration with SAP Datasphere in Q3 2024 of the Roadmap seems to be a great enhancement. SAP Analytics Cloud should be really just a frontend if you have SAP Datasphere too in your environment! 

  • Deploy new models in SAP Analytics Cloud to SAP Datasphere spaces, with the model data (facts and master data) residing in SAP Datasphere
  • Expose facts and public dimensions (except account dimensions) in the data builder of SAP Datasphere for analytic modeling

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV is unable to park Ser...
entry.content:
Hello, 

How was this issue resolved?

entry.title: Re: Timely Time Sheet Alerts for no records on previous working day
entry.content:
For those of you that have successfully set up Part 2, can you share how you are populating the 'has_time_records' field? We currently have it hard coded to populate the field as 'Yes' to indicate that a notification should be generated. However, with that setting, once the time sheets are submitted and approved, then I don't see how the record will ever change to 'No'.

Since we are using the Filters in the IC report to determine if there are pending entries, then it seems that when there are no more Pending Time Sheets, then the employee would not even be included in the report to change back to 'No'. A colleague is suggesting that we have to have a 2nd report with opposite filters that sets the field back to 'No'.

Even with that solution, if an employee is included in a report and gets the notification but still does not submit/approve, it appears that the record is not being updated again, so will the notification go out again on the next run?

Thanks in advance for any feedback. This sounds like a good solution, but we have been struggling with the execution of the steps that are not really covered.

Cindy

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding Tomorrow's MCQ Test
entry.content: Has the quiz link is been distributed?

entry.title: Binance Referans Kodu: TAYXRS3K
entry.content:
2024 yılı Binance referans kodu TAYXRS3K olarak belirlenmiştir. Bu referans kodu ile yeni üyelik oluşturulduğunda ömür boyu %20 komisyon indirimi ve 600$ hoşgeldin ödülü kazanabilirsiniz.

Binance, yeni üye olan kullanıcılara referans kimliği tanımlama imkanı vermiştir. Bu özel kodu kullanan kullanıcılar yapacağı her işlemde ödenmesi gereken komisyon tutarından %20 oranında tasarruf edebilir. Kodu boş bırakarak üyeliğini tamamlayanlar ise bu fırsattan yararlanamaz ve komisyon tutarının tamamını her defasında öder.

Sadece komisyon indirimi değil, 600 dolara varan ödül de alınabilir. Üye olduktan sonra ödül merkezine gidilip oldukça basit olan görevler tamamlanırsa anında 600$ ödül kazanabilirsiniz. Bunların tamamını yapabilmek için TAYXRS3K kodunu referans kimliği kısmına tanımlamalısınız.

Binance yeni üye olan kullanıcılara en fazla %20 komisyon indirimi sağlamaktadır. TAYXRS3K kodu ile en yüksek indirimi kazanabilirsiniz.

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content: Hello @stefan_schnell, I tried this combination as well. It wont generate the error, but doesn`t save the file. I think the code till this line works fine, because the window seems to be active, but the biggest obstacle is to move it further with any action. I also tried with sendkeys a and tab, to watch if it opens/changes but it didn`t. So I think something is wrong with sendkeys method
